svg.text: BOARD B - battery. LiPo pouch 67x34x6 lies BESIDE the board (Velcro + foam), 7.5A fuse inline in the + lead. Keep the cell >=25mm from any converter.

U3 boost EN is GATED: R1 pulls it LOW so the boost stays OFF until the Pi (booted on WALL) drives BOOST_EN high. Robot CANNOT power on from the battery when unplugged; the LiPo only rides a wall-loss so the Pi can WARN (~min) then shut down.
